name: Forbidden Swamp
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield and inflict [{Poison}:Arg2] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on all enemies. For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily has, the Base Shield +0.25%. Until the start of next turn, gain [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Endure} for each attack received.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield and inflict [{Poison}:Arg2] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} to all enemies. For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily has, the Base Shield +0.25%. Until the start of next turn, gain [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Endure} for each attack received. If HP is below 50%, gain an additional Shield and the applied {Poison} is doubled.
